fix(types): fix MeetingsContext access in StudioMeetingView

fix(pipeline): stabilize, speed up, and reduce costs of transcription pipeline

- Queue jobs instead of rejecting when at capacity (server-side pending queue)
- Retry meeting attachment up to 7x to fix "Meeting not found" race condition
- Wire skipChunkVAD/skipEarlyPyannote/skipVoiceProfileMatch options in pipeline
- Disable dead code: VAD (vad.py missing), pyannote (always null), per-speaker norm
- Eliminate double pipeline run (runEnhancementPostProcess was re-running full STT)
- Switch defaults: fast mode, whisper-1 fallback, overlap 2s, no LLM correction
- Add VOICELOG_ENABLE_MEETING_ANALYSIS env var (default: false)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix(ci): resolve git error 128 in Auto-Fix workflow
chore: auto-create tasks for 11 errors
chore: auto-create tasks for 11 errors
chore: auto-create tasks for 11 errors

fix: UI improvements — auto-tasks, summary length, smaller checkboxes

- Auto-trigger AI task suggestions when recording has transcript
- Expand summary prompt: minimum 10-15 sentences, 200-400 words
- Reduce task checkbox size from 18px to 14px across all views
- Fix KpiDashboard test mock hoisting (vi.hoisted)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(oom): reduce memory pressure on Railway transcription pipeline

- Raise RSS_LIMIT_BYTES from 1GB to 1.2GB (RSS includes shared libs)
- Raise max-old-space-size from 768MB to 1024MB in Dockerfile
- Reduce MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS from 2 to 1 (lower peak memory)
- Add aggressive GC after job rejection to reclaim memory faster

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: consolidate agent changes — infra hardening, tests, monitoring

- Refactor file deletion into _deleteFileIfPresent() with Sentry noise suppression
- Add graceful EADDRINUSE handling with handleServerListenError()
- Improve React list keys in NotesTab (content+index vs index-only)
- Add defensive type check in PeopleTab for setSelectedPersonId
- Integrate Railway GraphQL API and Vercel chart into monitoring
- Add 754 new test assertions (analysis, google, microsoft, server utils)
- Add .gitignore rules for generated artifacts
- Add testing documentation and Prism mock server config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
chore: auto-create tasks for 11 errors
fix(ci): disable GPT auto-fix to prevent infinite PR loop
chore: auto-create tasks for 11 errors

fix(ci): add missing yaml devDependency for contract tests

The api-contract.test.ts imports 'yaml' to parse OpenAPI spec but it
was not listed as a direct dependency, causing CI Backend Tests to fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix(ci): auto-fix failing tests via Gemini [skip ci]

fix(sentry): disable Console integration to respect sentry:false flag

Sentry v10's default Console integration captures console.warn/error
calls as events, bypassing our logger's { sentry: false } option.
This caused EADDRINUSE and legacy file cleanup warnings to appear
as Sentry issues despite being explicitly excluded from reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix(ci): auto-fix failing tests via Gemini [skip ci]

fix(upload): prevent 413 by lowering enhancement bitrate and chunk size

Root cause: enhanceAndReencode re-encoded at 128kbps (2x the original
64kbps recording), inflating files past the 10MB chunked threshold.
5MB chunks then exceeded Vercel's ~4.5MB serverless payload limit.

Fixes:
- Lower targetBitrate from 128kbps to 64kbps (matches recording bitrate)
- Lower CHUNK_SIZE from 5MB to 4MB (stays under Vercel limit)
- Add regression tests for bitrate and chunk size constraints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(mobile): comprehensive mobile responsiveness audit fixes

- Modal, dropdown, notification panel viewport-safe with min()
- Tab-switcher horizontal scroll with hidden scrollbar
- Notes panel stacks instead of hiding detail on mobile
- Toast positioned above player bar on mobile
- AskAI bubble viewport-safe width
- Close button 44px WCAG touch target
- Safe-area insets extended to 768px breakpoint
- Recorder panel compact layout on mobile
- UnifiedPlayer hides chips, enlarges controls on mobile
- Kanban board swipeable horizontal scroll with snap
- Calendar compact grid + dot indicators on small screens
- ff-player-bar auto height instead of fixed 120px
- ProfileTab sidebar collapses on mobile
- Speaker dropdown theme-aware + viewport-safe
- scroll-padding-bottom for fixed player bars
- Landscape orientation optimizations
- Minimum font sizes for accessibility

Also includes:
- ProcessingTimer component + tests
- useWorkspaceData hook improvements + tests
- httpClient retry logic + tests
- recorderStore en
fix(ci): auto-fix failing tests via Gemini [skip ci]

feat(audio): add client-side audio enhancement before upload

Integrate enhanceAndReencode pipeline (high-pass filter, spectral noise
reduction, noise gate) between VAD silence filter and server upload.
Re-encodes to WebM/Opus 128kbps so file size stays comparable to the
original — all processing runs in the browser at zero server cost.
